package rulecoverage

func PositiveDuplicateStructTagKey() string {
    ruleID := "duplicate_struct_tag_key"
    family := "consistency"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Struct field tags that repeat the same key more than once."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
